hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'DROP DATABASE'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'git push -f'*|*'git push --force'*|*'git push --force-with-lease'*|*'git reset --hard'*|*'dotnet ef database drop'*|*'dotnet ef migrations remove'*) echo 'BLOCK: Dangerous command detected. Review before proceeding.' && exit 1 ;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE" in *.cs) cd backend && dotnet format --include "$FILE" --no-restore 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd frontend && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
